Package com.saperion.ngc.iform.xml

Class ResultType

java.lang.Object
com.saperion.ngc.iform.xml.ResultType
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class ResultType extends Object implements Serializable

Java class for ResultType complex type.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class. 

 <complexType name="ResultType">
   <complexContent>
     <restriction base="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}anyType">
       <sequence>
         <element name="font" type="{http://www.saperion.com/NGXMLSchema}fontType" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="pos" type="{http://www.saperion.com/NGXMLSchema}posType"/>
         <element name="databinding" type="{http://www.saperion.com/NGXMLSchema}databindingType"/>
         <element name="title" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
         <element name="resStyle" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}unsignedShort"/>
         <element name="resFieldCnt" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}unsignedShort"/>
         <element name="sortAuto" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean"/>
         <element name="queryMask" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
         <element name="indexMask" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
         <element name="startEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean"/>
         <element name="listVersion" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}unsignedInt"/>
         <element name="saveLayout" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean"/>
         <element name="customACL" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean"/>
         <element name="defaultButton" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}unsignedShort"/>
         <element name="maxRecords" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}unsignedInt"/>
         <element name="isGrid" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean"/>
         <element name="colorOk" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}unsignedInt"/>
         <element name="colorError" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}unsignedInt"/>
         <element name="colorLine" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}unsignedInt"/>
         <element name="forceDocumentIndexMask" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean"/>
         <element name="filterEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean"/>
         <element name="saveFavoriteEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean"/>
         <element name="exportEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean"/>
         <element name="pageSize" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}unsignedShort"/>
         <element name="columns" type="{http://www.saperion.com/NGXMLSchema}columnType" maxOccurs="unbounded"/>
         <element name="script" type="{http://www.saperion.com/NGXMLSchema}ScriptType" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="resultDDC" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="lookupDDC" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean"/>
       </sequence>
     </restriction>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>

    • getColumns

      public List<ColumnType> getColumns()
      Gets the value of the columns property.

      This accessor method returns a reference to the live list, not a snapshot. Therefore any modification you make to the returned list will be present inside the JAXB object. This is why there is not a set method for the columns property.

      For example, to add a new item, do as follows: 

          getColumns().add(newItem);

      Objects of the following type(s) are allowed in the list ColumnType

    • getScript

      public ScriptType getScript()
      Gets the value of the script property.
      Returns:
